.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven Wrapper version constant from 0.5.5 to 3.1.1 to use the latest wrapper implementation.
Update the default download URL to point to the new Maven Wrapper artifact group (org.apache.maven.wrapper) corresponding to version 3.1.1.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.before:
private static final String DEFAULT_DOWNLOAD_URL = "https://repo.maven.apache.org/maven2/io/takari/maven-wrapper/"
        + WRAPPER_VERSION + "/maven-wrapper-" + WRAPPER_VERSION + ".jar";

src/test/java/org/acme/GreetingResourceT.general_idea: Add JUnit 5 annotation to disable the test on Windows operating systems.
Import the OS enum class for the annotation.
Change the test to hit the /hello endpoint instead of /hello/world.
Update the expected response body to match the new endpoint output.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler release target from Java 17 to Java 21 to match the migration goal.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles for Java 17, failing the requirement to produce Java 21 bytecode and potentially missing JDK 21 specific language features or optimizations.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Quarkus platform BOM from version 2.8.2.Final to 3.19.4 to support Java 21 and modern Quarkus features.
pom.xml.why_exists: Quarkus 2.x does not support Java 21; upgrading to Quarkus 3.x is required for runtime compatibility with JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace the deprecated quarkus-resteasy dependency with the new quarkus-rest and quarkus-rest-jackson dependencies.
pom.xml.why_exists: The quarkus-resteasy extension is removed in Quarkus 3; using it causes compile errors or missing class exceptions at runtime.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add the quarkus-smallrye-openapi extension to provide OpenAPI documentation support.
Add the quarkus-hibernate-orm-rest-data-panache extension for simplified data access.
Add the quarkus-jdbc-postgresql extension to support PostgreSQL database connectivity.
Add the quarkus-openshift extension to enable OpenShift deployment capabilities.
Add the quarkus-smallrye-health extension to provide health check endpoints.
Upgrade the maven-compiler-plugin from 3.8.1 to 3.14.0 to ensure compatibility with Java 21 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of maven-compiler-plugin may fail to compile code targeting Java 21 or handle new language features correctly.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the maven-surefire-plugin from 3.0.0-M5 to 3.5.2 to ensure test execution compatibility with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Surefire versions may fail to launch or execute tests on Java 21 due to internal API changes or module system restrictions.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add the formatter-maven-plugin to enforce code formatting standards.
Move the maven-failsafe-plugin configuration from the native profile to the main build section to run integration tests by default.
Add the skipITs property to the native profile to control integration test execution.
Remove the failsafe.useModulePath property as it is no longer needed or supported in the new plugin versions.
Rename the project artifact ID from getting-started-on-quarkus-demo to getting-started.

.mvn/wrapper/maven-wrapper.properties.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven Wrapper configuration to a newer version compatible with modern JDKs.

mvnw.general_idea: Update the Apache License URL from HTTP to HTTPS.
Rename the script description from 'Maven2' to 'Maven'.
Add support for loading /usr/local/etc/mavenrc configuration file.
Fix Java command resolution to avoid conflicts with shell functions named 'command'.
Upgrade the Maven Wrapper JAR from io.takari 0.5.5 to org.apache.maven.wrapper 3.1.1.
Add cleanup of partial downloads if wget fails.
Add cleanup of partial downloads if wget with auth fails.
Remove trailing whitespace in the curl fallback section.
Pass MAVEN_DEBUG_OPTS to the Java command for debugging support.
Reformat the exec command arguments for better readability.

mvnw.cmd.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven Wrapper JAR version from 0.5.5 to 3.1.1 to use the modern Apache-hosted wrapper.
Update the fallback download URL group ID from io.takari to org.apache.maven.wrapper to match the new wrapper version.
Add usebackq to FOR loop to correctly parse properties file with backticks or special characters in newer Windows environments.
Replace deprecated HOME environment variable with USERPROFILE for locating mavenrc scripts on Windows.
Replace deprecated HOME environment variable with USERPROFILE for locating post-execution mavenrc scripts on Windows.
Change exit command to cmd /C exit /B to ensure proper error code propagation in Windows CMD.
Update Apache License URL from http to https.
Update header comment from Maven2 to Maven.
Fix typo in comment from 'key stroke' to 'keystroke'.
mvnw.cmd.before: @REM MAVEN_BATCH_PAUSE - set to 'on' to wait for a key stroke before ending
mvnw.cmd.after: @REM MAVEN_BATCH_PAUSE - set to 'on' to wait for a keystroke before ending

mvnw.cmd.general_idea: Reformat the Java execution command with line continuations for readability.
Remove spaces around == in IF statements for consistency.
Remove spaces around == in IF statement for MAVEN_BATCH_PAUSE.
Remove spaces around == in IF statement for MAVEN_TERMINATE_CMD.

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.jvm.general_idea: Update the Docker base image from UBI8/OpenJDK 11 to UBI9/OpenJDK 21 to align with the target JDK version.
src/main/docker/Dockerfile.jvm.why_exists: The application requires JDK 21 runtime features; running on JDK 11 will result in runtime errors or missing class definitions for Java 21 APIs.

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.jvm.general_idea: Remove the explicit LANG environment variable, relying on the base image defaults or other mechanisms for locale settings.
Remove the AB_JOLOKIA_OFF environment variable, likely because Jolokia is no longer included or required in the new base image or Quarkus version.
Move JVM options from JAVA_OPTS to JAVA_OPTS_APPEND to prevent overriding default JVM tuning provided by the new base image entrypoint script.
Explicitly define the entrypoint to use the JBoss container run-java.sh script, ensuring proper JVM tuning and startup behavior in the new base image.

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.legacy-jar.general_idea: Upgrade the Docker base image from UBI8/OpenJDK 11 to UBI9/OpenJDK 21 to match the target JDK version.
src/main/docker/Dockerfile.legacy-jar.why_exists: The application requires JDK 21 runtime features; running on JDK 11 will result in runtime errors or missing class definitions.

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.legacy-jar.general_idea: Switch from JAVA_OPTS to JAVA_OPTS_APPEND to align with the new container entrypoint script's variable handling.
src/main/docker/Dockerfile.legacy-jar.why_exists: The new entrypoint script (run-java.sh) may ignore JAVA_OPTS or handle it differently (e.g., overriding defaults), causing application configuration to be lost or misconfigured at runtime.

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.legacy-jar.general_idea: Explicitly define the entrypoint to use the JBoss container run script.
src/main/docker/Dockerfile.legacy-jar.why_exists: Without the explicit entrypoint, the container may not execute the application correctly or apply necessary JVM tuning provided by the run-java.sh script in the new base image.

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.legacy-jar.general_idea: Remove the AB_JOLOKIA_OFF environment variable as it is no longer needed or supported in the new image context.
Remove the LANG environment variable, likely because the new base image handles locale differently or it is redundant.
Update the build command comment to reflect the new Quarkus property name for legacy jar packaging.
Update documentation comments regarding debug port exposure and environment variables.
src/main/docker/Dockerfile.legacy-jar.before: # you will have to expose the debug port (default 5005) like this :  EXPOSE 8080 5005
src/main/docker/Dockerfile.legacy-jar.after:
# you will have to expose the debug port (default 5005 being the default) like this :  EXPOSE 8080 5005.
# Additionally you will have to set -e JAVA_DEBUG=true and -e JAVA_DEBUG_PORT=*:5005
# when running the container

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.legacy-jar.general_idea: Update documentation comments to clarify the difference between JAVA_OPTS and JAVA_OPTS_APPEND.
src/main/docker/Dockerfile.legacy-jar.before: # - JAVA_OPTS: JVM options passed to the `java` command (example: "-verbose:class")
src/main/docker/Dockerfile.legacy-jar.after:
# - JAVA_OPTS: JVM options passed to the `java` command (example: "-verbose:class") - Be aware that this will override
# the default JVM options, use `JAVA_OPTS_APPEND` to append options

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.native.general_idea: Upgrade the base container image from UBI 8 to UBI 9 to align with the Java 21 runtime environment.
Explicitly set executable permissions on the native runner binary during the copy step.
Change the container execution instruction from CMD to ENTRYPOINT for more robust process management.
Update the documentation comment to reflect the new Maven property for native builds.

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.native-micro.general_idea: Switch the base image to the UBI 9 variant compatible with Java 21 and Quarkus 3.x native builds.
src/main/docker/Dockerfile.native-micro.why_exists: The old base image (v1.0) is based on an older OS/JDK version incompatible with Java 21 native binaries; using it results in runtime failures or missing libraries.

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.native-micro.general_idea: Replace CMD with ENTRYPOINT to align with modern container best practices and Quarkus native image expectations.
Add explicit chmod to the COPY instruction to ensure the native binary is executable without a separate RUN chmod step.
Update the build command comment to reflect the new Quarkus property for native builds.
